projectDescription: A modern Java framework for building Telegram bots with a chain-of-responsibility handler pipeline, dialog state machines, declarative filters, interactive keyboards, and a smart responder API.
keyFeatures: Chain-of-responsibility upstream handler pipeline with flexible ordering
Declarative filter system with 40+ pre-built predicates and composable and/or/negate combinators
State-machine dialog system with builder-based (BuildableDialogPart) and inheritance-based (ExtendableDialogPart) step definitions
Interactive keyboard support for inline and reply keyboards with per-button action lambdas
SmartResponder API for one-line message and media sending with automatic long-message splitting
SmartResponderFactory for sending proactive notifications outside of request handling
Modular architecture: plug in only long-polling or webhook transport modules
Pre-built handlers: CommandUpstreamHandler, TextCommandUpstreamHandler, DialogUpstreamHandler, ExceptionReportUpstreamHandler, CannotProcessUpstreamHandler
Pluggable dialog repository (in-memory by default) and SPI extension points for new update types
Downstream handler pipeline for post-processing outgoing messages (e.g., inject default keyboard)
publicApiSurface: ChainedBot (abstract) — primary bot base class; override configureUpstream() and configureDownstream()
BaseUpstreamHandler (abstract) — base for custom message handlers
FilteredUpstreamHandler (abstract) — filter-gated handler base
CommandUpstreamHandler (abstract) — Telegram /command routing
TextCommandUpstreamHandler (abstract) — plain-text command routing
InteractiveKeyboardUpstreamHandler (abstract) — keyboard button routing
DialogUpstreamHandler — built-in dialog state-machine handler
ExceptionReportUpstreamHandler — exception catch-and-report handler
CannotProcessUpstreamHandler — terminal fallback handler
DialogImpl<ENUM> — multi-step dialog with builder; DialogImpl.builder()
BuildableDialogPart<ENUM> — fluent builder for dialog steps
ExtendableDialogPart<ENUM> (abstract) — subclass-based dialog step
DialogContext<ENUM> — dialog-scope state + storage during dialog execution
Filter (functional interface) — Predicate<RequestContext> with and/or/negate
Filters (static factory) — 40+ pre-built Filter instances
As (static factory) — 70+ Unboxer extractors for Update data
SmartResponder — high-level send API (text, media, any BotApiMethod)
SmartResponderFactory — create SmartResponder for any chatId
RequestContext — per-update context: UUID, responder, storage, raw Update access
Storage — typed key-value bag (request scope and dialog scope)
InlineInteractiveButton — inline keyboard button with action lambda
ReplyInteractiveButton — reply keyboard button with action lambda
AddDefaultKeyboardDownstreamHandler — auto-inject keyboard into all outgoing messages
LongPollingBotAdapter — wraps ChainedBot for long-polling deployment
LongPollingBotApplication — registers and starts long-polling bots
WebhookBotAdapter — wraps ChainedBot for TelegramBots webhook server
WebhookBotApplication — registers and starts webhook bots
FrameworkWebhookBotAdapter — webhook adapter for external HTTP servers (Spring, etc.)
